vllm.title: [Model] support baichuan-13b based on baichuan-7b
vllm.author: Oliver-ss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
baichuan-7b and baichuan-13b have different architectures in config.json, "BaichuanForCausalLM" for baichuan-13b and "BaiChuanForCausalLM" for baichuan-7b.
The model structures are almost the same except for position embedding. (RoPE for baichuan-7b and Alibi for baichuan-13b.) So most of the code c
